extended_help:
Open the Nova Forge to craft equipment from materials you've gathered.

**Usage:**
• `/craft` — Browse all craftable recipes
• `/craft category:weapon` — Filter by category
• `/craft recipe:iron_sword` — Craft instantly (autocomplete supported)

**Requirements:**
• Have enough materials in your inventory (from /explore or /hunt)
• Meet the required level
• Costs {{cost}} stamina per craft

Tip: Use the dropdown menu to see ingredient costs before crafting.
none: 📦 No craftable items! Get materials from /explore or /hunt
